summary: High‑quality audience recording praised as the best AUD for this date, capturing a great show.
review: Both reviewers rate this tape very highly, noting that the audience source is pitch‑corrected and patched up to sound excellent—arguably better than the available SBD. The performance itself is described simply as a "great show" with no specific criticisms, making it an appealing listen despite being an AUD.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive comments on both the recording (excellent audience source) and the performance (great show), though limited detail on musical specifics keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Pitch‑corrected, patched up nicely; regarded as the best audience recording for this date and clearer than the contemporary SBD which suffers from a "cardboard box" sound.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the concert simply as a great show but give no detailed commentary on pacing or song transitions.
